meta.title: THE FORGE — Build Discipline, Purpose and Direction
meta.description: A platform for men who choose to work on themselves. No noise, no validation — only discipline, clarity and real growth.
meta.ogDescription: A brotherhood of men building discipline, strength and purpose together.

hero.title: Forge the Strongest Version of Yourself
hero.subtitle: A space for men who choose to work on themselves. No distractions, no validation — only discipline, clarity and real growth.

problem.title: The Problem
problem.p1: Many men today feel lost, isolated, and without purpose. Society offers no clear path to strength — physical, mental, or spiritual.
problem.p2: Too much noise. Conflicting advice. Shallow content. No real community. No structure. No direction.
problem.p3: Without guidance, many men drift through life without direction.
problem.imageAlt: Man reflecting, representing isolation and lack of direction

reality.title: The Reality Men Face Today
reality.intro: Across the world, millions of men struggle with isolation, lack of purpose and broken support systems. These numbers reveal a growing crisis.
reality.stat1Desc: Nearly 80% of suicides worldwide are men.
reality.stat3Desc: A growing number of men report chronic loneliness.
reality.footnote: Future versions of the platform will track global trends and statistics by country over time.

solution.title: The Solution
solution.imageAlt: Men training together as a supportive community
solution.p1: THE FORGE is not a social network. It is an environment for men who choose to take control of their lives.
solution.p2: You don’t come here to be seen. You come here to work on yourself — with structure, discipline and real support.
solution.p3: The forge is not comfortable. But it is where men build direction, character and purpose.
solution.structureDesc: A system that helps you build discipline and stay consistent.
solution.brotherhoodDesc: Men working on themselves, supporting each other without competition.
solution.guidanceDesc: Clear direction based on experience, not noise.

focusMode.title: Focus Mode
focusMode.intro: This is not a tracker. It is a system to build real discipline. What you do here reflects in your life.

community.title: Community
community.intro: This is not a place to impress others. It is a place to share your process, learn and contribute value to other men.

training.title: Training Groups
training.desc: Find partners for gym routines, workout plans and physical challenges.

books.title: Books & Film Discussions
books.desc: Debates and analysis of books, philosophy and meaningful films.

life.title: Real Conversations
life.desc: Experiences, struggles and lessons without filters or appearances.

eventGroups.title: Event Groups
eventGroups.desc: Create groups to organize activities and local meetups.

supportCircles.title: Men Supporting Men
supportCircles.desc: Spaces for honest conversations and building resilience.

business.title: Business & Networking
business.desc: Connect with other members to collaborate and build projects.

experts.title: Professional Support
experts.intro: Professional support when needed, without replacing personal responsibility.

coaching.title: Coaches
coaching.desc: Guidance for discipline and life direction.

events.title: Real World Brotherhood
events.intro: Real life is where everything is tested. Connect with other men beyond the screen.

bikers.title: Bikers Brotherhood
bikers.alt: Bikers Brotherhood meetup in New York

cta.title: Start Building a Life With Direction
cta.subtitle: You don’t need more information. You need structure, discipline and action.
